_comment: Publish boundary for thinkwithv-skills. The 'public' half of the public/private split — only skills listed here ship. 'source: vault' skills are synced from the private vault by scripts/sync-from-vault.sh; 'source: repo' skills are canonical in this repo (e.g. multi-file skills the flat vault can't hold until the directory-per-skill migration).

skills.name: chat-synopsis
skills.note: multi-file (SKILL.md + commands + references); canonical here until the vault goes directory-per-skill
